description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal shipping container with a weathered, industrial appearance. The sides feature vertical slats and are marked with rust and wear, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. Both long sides display a prominent white 'msc' logo, partially faded, suggesting use by a shipping or logistics company. One short end is reinforced with vertical bars and displays stenciled white text indicating weight and handling information, as well as a small yellow caution label. The opposite short end is solid and unmarked, showing only the aged, dark metal surface. The top is flat, metallic, and similarly weathered, suitable for stacking or supporting other objects.
description: A large, weathered metal shipping container with vertical slats, industrial markings, and a faded 'msc' logo on both long sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slatted metal side with a large, faded 'msc' logo in white at the center.
description_view_1: Short end view reveals reinforced vertical bars, stenciled white handling information, and a small yellow caution label.
description_view_2: Opposite long side, nearly identical to the front, with the same 'msc' logo and slatted design.
description_view_3: Solid, unmarked short end with a plain, weathered metal surface and no visible markings or features.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: white 'msc' logo on both long sides, stenciled handling info and yellow caution label on one short end
